response.overview: # Translation  Sarah (Elizabeth Tan) has just started working at QRT Media as a journalist. Tiara (Lia Natalia), who hosts a program there, is an influencer who is Sarah's idol. Sarah is heavily influenced by Tiara, and this is disliked by Rina, Sarah's coworker. One day, Tiara is kidnapped and Sarah along with Rina (Jaja Iliyes) investigate Tiara's disappearance! Sarah, in her early 20s, is a beautiful and cheerful girl from a village who has moved to the city to work at QRT Media as a journalist, and also wants to meet the famous influencer she admires. Rina is Sarah's coworker at QRT Media who has a curious nature and is willing to put herself in danger. She is a quiet person who dresses in old-fashioned style. Because of her peculiar nature, all the employees do not want to approach her. Tiara, in her late 20s, is a senior at QRT Media.
response.title: Penyiasat Viral
